SEARCH
Package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api

Class RecipeManager

java.lang.Object
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.RecipeManager
public class RecipeManager extends Object
Recipe manager for Furnaces

You can get an instance of this class from VirtualFurnaceAPI.getRecipeManager()
